title: How a Godly Man Wants More and Stays Content
caption:
Ambition and contentment feel like opposites. Scripture holds them at the same time.

He works like it depends on him. Effort is still the assignment, and a man who won't build is being lazy and calling it peace.

But he rests like it depends on God. He's not carrying the outcome alone, so the drive doesn't own him. He wants growth without resenting where he is right now, because resentment toward now is what turns ambition into idolatry.

"I have learned, in whatever state I am, to be content... I can do all things through him who strengthens me." — Philippians 4:11-13

Read that in order. Contentment came first. The strength for everything else came after.

Save this if you're building for next year and forgetting to thank God for this one.

#faith #contentment #christianmen #ambition #godlymen #manofgod #philippians #scripture #christianity
